command: getprop ro.build.fingerprint && getprop ro.build.display.id && getprop ro.build.version.security_patch
getprop ro.build.tags && getprop ro.build.type && getprop ro.product.model && getprop ro.product.brand && getprop ro.product.manufacturer
getprop ro.product.model && getprop ro.product.brand && getprop ro.product.manufacturer && getprop ro.product.name && getprop ro.product.device
getprop ro.hardware && getprop ro.kernel.qemu && getprop ro.product.board && ls /dev/qemu_pipe 2>/dev/null && ls /dev/goldfish_pipe 2>/dev/null || true
which su 2>/dev/null; ls /sbin/su 2>/dev/null; ls /system/su 2>/dev/null; pm list packages | grep -iE 'magisk|superuser|supersu|kingroot' 2>/dev/null || echo CLEAN
am start -W -n app.attestation.auditor/.MainActivity 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; logcat -d -s PlayIntegrity:* 2>/dev/null | tail -20 || echo PLAY_INTEGRITY_UNAVAILABLE
getprop ro.hardware.keystore && getprop ro.vendor.build.security_patch && getprop keystore.strongbox 2>/dev/null || true
cat /proc/self/maps | grep -E 'xposed|lsposed|EdXposed|yahfa|sandhook|whale' 2>/dev/null || echo CLEAN
pm list packages | grep -E 'magisk|lsposed|xposed|riru|zygisk|kernelsu|apatch' 2>/dev/null || echo CLEAN
dd if=/proc/self/maps bs=1 2>/dev/null | head -c 0; cat /proc/self/maps | grep -E 'libart\.so|libdvm\.so' | head -5 || true
cat /proc/self/maps | grep -E 'frida|gum-js|gadget|linjector|substrate|dobby|shadowhook|bytehook' 2>/dev/null || echo CLEAN
cat /proc/self/status | grep -i tracerpid 2>/dev/null || echo TracerPid:0

logcat -c 2>/dev/null; am start -W -n com.aheaditysolutions.securityapp/cz.talsec.android.security.rasp.FreeRASPActivity 2>/dev/null; sleep 3; logcat -d -t 50 2>/dev/null | grep -i 'talsec\|freerasp\|RASP\|ThreatDetect' | tail -20 || echo FREERRASP_NOT_INSTALLED

logcat -c 2>/dev/null; am start -W -n io.github.ir0nbyte.playintegrityfixdetector/.MainActivity 2>/dev/null; sleep 4; logcat -d -t 100 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'PIFD|playintegrity|PIF|spoof|TrickyStore|fake_keybox|verdict|BASIC|DEVICE|STRONG' | tail -30 || echo PIFD_NOT_INSTALLED

logcat -c 2>/dev/null; am start -W -n app.attestation.auditor/.AuditActivity 2>/dev/null; sleep 3; logcat -d -t 100 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'auditor|attestation|verified|LOCKED|UNLOCKED|user|avb|strongbox' | tail -20 || echo AUDITOR_NOT_INSTALLED
cat /proc/self/maps | grep -E 'frida-agent|gum-js-loop|frida-gadget|linjector' 2>/dev/null; ls /data/local/tmp/frida* 2>/dev/null; ls /data/local/tmp/re.frida* 2>/dev/null || echo CLEAN
settings get secure mock_location 2>/dev/null || dumpsys location 2>/dev/null | grep -i mock | head -5 || echo CLEAN
dumpsys window 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'mLockScreenShown|KeyguardOccluded|lockTask' | head -5 || settings get secure lockscreen.disabled 2>/dev/null || echo UNKNOWN
dumpsys wifi 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'SecurityType|encryption|KeyMgmt|OPEN|WEP' | head -10 || echo UNKNOWN
settings get global development_settings_enabled 2>/dev/null; getprop init.svc.adbd 2>/dev/null; dumpsys accessibility 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'appium|uiautomator|monkeyrunner' | head -5 || echo CLEAN
dumpsys media_projection 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'recording|active|token' | head -5 || echo CLEAN
